document.source_title: ‘100% bowler & 100% batter’: Meet Delhi Capitals’ new all-round hero Madhav Tiwari

claims.claim_text: Madhav Tiwari considers himself both a bowler and a batter.
claims.evidence_text: Tiwari said he sees himself as both equally.

entities.name: Madhav Tiwari
entities.evidence_text: In just his second IPL match and his first of this season, 22-year-old Madhav Tiwari picked up two wickets.

entities.name: Delhi Capitals
entities.description: IPL team that Madhav Tiwari plays for.
entities.evidence_text: Tiwari was picked up by Delhi Capitals for Rs 40 lakh in the 2024 IPL mega auction.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: Opponent team in the match where Tiwari performed.
entities.evidence_text: Tiwari guided Delhi Capitals to a three-wicket win over Punjab Kings.

entities.name: Ian Bell
entities.description: Batting coach who provided advice to Tiwari.
entities.evidence_text: Tiwari spoke about how batting coach Ian Bell’s tips helped him.

events.event: Madhav Tiwari's performance in IPL match
events.evidence_text: Tiwari picked up two wickets, including those of Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly.

metrics.name: wickets
metrics.evidence_text: Madhav Tiwari picked up two wickets.

metrics.name: runs
metrics.evidence_text: He then played an eight-ball cameo of 18 runs.

relationships.subject: Madhav Tiwari
relationships.evidence_text: Tiwari was picked up by Delhi Capitals for Rs 40 lakh.

citations.title: ‘100% bowler & 100% batter’: Meet Delhi Capitals’ new all-round hero Madhav Tiwari

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet covering sports.
